title: Masterplast Heat Massaging Spray, Ready To Use, Muscle Relief & Comfort 150 Ml
features: FAST RELIEF: Masterplast Heat Massaging Spray provides instant relief for mild to moderate pain. Easy and ready to use, use the heat massaging spray relieves rheumatic pain, muscular aches and strains
WARMING: Effective, warming relief to the affected areas. Use directly after exercise if required
INNOVATIVE: Specially formulated to provide the healing properties of heat therapy, quickly and instantly, ideal to keep in a gym, sports or football kit bag

READY TO USE: Easy to apply a direct burst of warm relief to a specific area. The spray can be used immediately after exercise. Apply as often as required. Wash hands after use. For external use only. Do not use on broken or irritated skin
